name: cern-code
description: Optional read-only discovery of public and user-authorized CERN GitLab projects and source code.

interface.shortDescription: Discover CERN GitLab projects and code.
interface.longDescription: An optional integration boundary for read-only CERN GitLab project, repository, release, and source-code discovery.
defaultPrompt: Find the public CERN GitLab project for DaVinci.
Inspect the structure of an LHCb software project.
